objective: maximize the summed EdgeBench-format ad placement score on public deterministic cases

constraints.task_summary: Edit solution.cpp. Read n followed by n x/y/r triples and print n non-overlapping integer rectangles. Use tools/bin/gen with a seed file and tools/bin/tester for public local scoring.
constraints.edgebench_alignment: The submitted file, text I/O, generator CLI, tester CLI, Score = <integer> output, compiler mode, five-second per-case limit, CPU-only/no-internet rule, and documented 1 GB memory limit match EdgeBench ad_placement_optimization. Cases and scoring remain public synthetic fixtures; no hidden judge is wired into GP.
